sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33036" key="e)ktomeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκτομ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐκτέμνω</etym>) <sense id="n33036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one that cuts out</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
